title: Scope of Work
description: Schema for a complete scope-of-work record. Defines the boundary, inclusions, exclusions, trade responsibilities, operations, inspection steps, commissioning steps, and closeout requirements for a defined scope package.

scope_id.description: Unique identifier for this scope of work.

title.description: Human-readable title for the scope of work.

csi_sections.description: CSI MasterFormat section numbers covered by this scope.

trade_responsibilities.description: References to trade_responsibility records associated with this scope.

operations.description: References to work_operation records within this scope.

inspection_steps.description: References to inspection_step records required by this scope.

commissioning_steps.description: References to commissioning_step records within this scope.

closeout_requirements.description: References to closeout_requirement records for this scope.

interface_zones.description: Interface zone identifiers where scope handoffs occur.

control_layers_affected.description: Control layer identifiers affected by this scope.

climate_context.description: Climate zone and environmental context affecting scope execution.

geometry_context.description: Building geometry context relevant to scope boundaries.
